user_query:
I'm building a 15-minute BTC/USDT momentum trend-following futures bot for our internal research desk and I want it set up end-to-end locally. Please do the following:

1) Read my strategy brief at input/strategy.md and use the OHLCV data at input/BTCUSDT_15m_148d.csv. Assume all confirmations are pre-approved for this run.
2) Generate a complete bot parameter JSON based on the brief, including bilingual copy (English + Chinese) for name_i18n, personality_i18n, and description_i18n. Enforce these guardrails: leverage must be <= 150; if leverage > 20x then sl_atr_mult >= 2.5; backtest day cap 365; defaults are BTC/USDT on 15m with $10,000 capital unless I explicitly override in the brief. Use the provided CSV as the data source.
3) Enable weekly evolution (treat it as On) and immediately run in evolution mode without waiting for additional confirmations. Produce an evolution schedule with at least 3 rounds where parameters change meaningfully between rounds based on your reflection on the strategy (you can summarize the logic in text files; no platform uploads are needed).
4) Produce a local backtest result in evolution mode using the provided CSV. Include return, Sharpe, and trade count in the result JSON. Also include an evolution_log object/list with at least one segment-level note.
5) Write the following files:
   - output/bot_params.json (includes all trading params + bilingual fields)
   - output/evolution_schedule.json (>= 3 rounds; round numbers increasing; params adjusted across rounds)
   - output/backtest_result.json (must include keys: mode="evolution", metrics.return, metrics.sharpe, metrics.trades, csv_path set to input/BTCUSDT_15m_148d.csv, and an evolution_log)
   - output/execution_summary.txt (briefly list symbol, timeframe, capital, evolution on/off, and data source path; plus a one-shot summary and the three-option next step menu: A) start live auto trading, B) upload to platform for verification, C) adjust parameters and rerun)
   - output/risk_disclosure.md (plain-English disclosure that includes the exact phrases "Backtesting results do not guarantee future performance", "Leverage cap: 150x", and a note that "sl_atr_mult >= 2.5 for leverage > 20x").

Important:
- Use only the provided CSV and keep all paths relative as above.
- Ensure the bilingual copy is natural in both languages (do not mirror the same text verbatim) and within limits: name_i18n.zh/en <= 64 chars, personality_i18n.zh/en <= 64 chars, description_i18n.zh/en <= 280 chars.
- In execution_summary.txt, clearly show: Symbol, Timeframe, Capital, Evolution: on, Data source: input/BTCUSDT_15m_148d.csv, and the A/B/C next steps.
- Do not connect to any external platform or start live trading; this is a local research artifact only.

Once done, place all artifacts under output/ paths exactly as specified.
